channel.title: Hazem Moghni - Egyptian Content Creator
channel.description: Creating content about Egypt STEM Schools and studying abroad

item.title: Why learn logical fallacies?
item.dc:creator: Hazem Moghni
item.description:
Have you ever had an argument with someone and felt like they said something wrong but couldn’t explain it? I am here to help you.

The post Why learn logical fallacies? appeared first on Hazem Moghni.

item.title: It’s Not Your Fault: Thanaweya Amma Is Rigged!
item.dc:creator: Hazem Moghni
item.description:
Egypt's general secondary education, AKA Thanaweya Amma (Arabic: ثانوية عامة), is designed so that students are doomed to fail... probably.

The post It’s Not Your Fault: Thanaweya Amma Is Rigged! appeared first on Hazem Moghni.

item.title: The Sad Story of Egypt STEM Schools
item.dc:creator: Hazem Moghni
item.description:
I mention Egypt STEM Schools a lot on my website, but what exactly are they? For starters, they are a failed project.

The post The Sad Story of Egypt STEM Schools appeared first on Hazem Moghni.

item.title: I’m a pessimist… and so should you!
item.dc:creator: Hazem Moghni
item.description:
Some say I'm a pessimist. The reason is I'm a strong believer of this: Everything that probably goes wrong, will go wrong.

The post I’m a pessimist… and so should you! appeared first on Hazem Moghni.

item.title: YouTube: Why, How, and What?
item.dc:creator: Hazem Moghni
item.description:
Why create videos on YouTube? Or anything for that matter? And why NOW?

The post YouTube: Why, How, and What? appeared first on Hazem Moghni.
